canadian_tools.board_use: Importer duty/tax accounting and account-readiness gate.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Orientation only; does not prove importer registration, duty/tax readiness, or CARM account control.
canadian_tools.name: CBSA Assessment and Revenue Management (CARM)

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian import workflow baseline for go-live checklist design.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Orientation only; does not replace CBSA, customs broker, or legal advice.
canadian_tools.name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian tariff-classification evidence source for the compliance lane.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Orientation only; tariff classification needs qualified review.
canadian_tools.name: CBSA Customs Tariff 2026

canadian_tools.board_use: CFIA-regulated commodity requirements lookup for food-import review.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Reference only; CFIA AIRS and applicable law need qualified review before product claims.
canadian_tools.name: CFIA Automated Import Reference System

canadian_tools.board_use: Potential future API-style verification integration requiring access credentials.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Access and usage rights are not proven; AVS credentials remain an implementation blocker.
canadian_tools.name: CFIA AIRS Verification Service

canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Orientation only; product applicability and permits require qualified review.
canadian_tools.name: Global Affairs Canada Import Controls and Import Permits

canadian_tools.board_use: Legal reference point for controlled imports.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Reference only; legal interpretation requires qualified counsel or compliance reviewer.
canadian_tools.name: Justice Laws Import Control List

canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Screening evidence must be dated and reviewed; source presence alone does not clear parties.
canadian_tools.name: Consolidated Canadian Autonomous Sanctions List

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian trade-data source for market and source research.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Data availability only; market size and demand claims need a dated model.
canadian_tools.name: ISED Trade Data Online

canadian_tools.board_use: Importer discovery and buyer-research seed list.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Discovery only; does not prove buyer validation or supplier recommendation.
canadian_tools.name: Canadian Importers Database

canadian_tools.board_use: Source for finding a qualified Canadian customs broker review lane.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Directory only; does not create a broker relationship or signoff.
canadian_tools.name: CBSA Licensed Customs Brokers

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian permit and licence discovery lane by location and business activity.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Discovery only; actual permits/licences need jurisdiction-specific confirmation.
canadian_tools.name: BizPaL

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian business planning and structure readiness reference.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Planning reference only; does not replace accounting, tax, or legal advice.
canadian_tools.name: Canada.ca Planning a Business

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian financial-planning structure for funding and runway assumptions.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Template reference only; financial projections need founder/accountant review.
canadian_tools.name: BDC Financial Plan Template

canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Privacy orientation only; legal/privacy counsel review remains required before launch.
canadian_tools.name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA Requirements in Brief

canadian_tools.board_use: Canadian small/medium organization cybersecurity baseline for launch controls.
canadian_tools.claim_boundary: Security baseline orientation only; implementation and audit evidence are separate gates.
canadian_tools.name: Canadian Centre for Cyber Security Baseline Cyber Security Controls

human_approval_gates.gate: Canadian customs/trade/food compliance signoff is required before external claims.
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Route the generated packet to a licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified reviewer.

human_approval_gates.gate: Canadian legal/privacy review is required before public copy, data collection, or fundraising documents are sent as official materials.
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Have counsel/privacy reviewer approve terms, privacy posture, liability boundary, and claims.

human_approval_gates.gate: Funding ask, pricing, runway, and spend plan require founder/accountant/finance review.
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Approve a 12-month operating plan and first 90-day budget before commitments.

human_approval_gates.gate: Source rights, refresh cadence, lineage, and API credentials must be approved before external source claims.
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Add a no-write refresh proof and source-rights approval.

human_approval_gates.gate: Deployment environment, access, logging, backup, incident response, support, and rollback require operator/security approval.
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Approve private beta deployment controls before external users.

human_approval_gates.gate: operator launch owner must approve the private beta scope and support workflow
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Board reviews the generated brief and either approves a private beta or sends corrections.

human_approval_gates.gate: licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified trade compliance reviewer must verify CBSA/CARM, tariff, CFIA, import controls, sanctions, and claim language
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Send the country matrix and source packet to a licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified compliance reviewer.

human_approval_gates.gate: founder, accountant, or finance advisor must approve financial projections, funding ask, runway, and pricing assumptions
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Founder and finance reviewer should approve a 12-month budget, pricing experiment, and cash runway before spend commitments.

human_approval_gates.gate: Canadian counsel or privacy reviewer must approve legal copy, PIPEDA/privacy posture, entity/IP/terms, and public claims
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Have Canadian counsel/privacy reviewer approve terms, privacy copy, liability boundaries, and investor language.

human_approval_gates.gate: data owner must approve source rights, refresh cadence, lineage, and any credentialed/paid source usage
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Implement a dated no-write refresh proof and attach source-rights approval before external source claims.

human_approval_gates.gate: operator/security owner must approve deployment environment, access control, incident response, backups, and support coverage
human_approval_gates.next_valid_move: Approve a controlled private beta environment with access control, logging, incident response, and rollback owner.

launch_controls.control: Only private controlled beta or board review is allowed; public launch remains closed.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Board approves or rejects private beta scope.

launch_controls.control: External sends, paid actions, advice claims, and supplier recommendations remain zero.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Keep counters at zero unless a future approved launch gate opens them.

launch_controls.control: Canadian official tools and references are attached with claim boundaries.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Refresh dates before each board or launch review.

launch_controls.control: Canadian customs/trade/food compliance signoff is required before external claims.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Route the generated packet to a licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified reviewer.

launch_controls.control: Canadian legal/privacy review is required before public copy, data collection, or fundraising documents are sent as official materials.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Have counsel/privacy reviewer approve terms, privacy posture, liability boundary, and claims.

launch_controls.control: Funding ask, pricing, runway, and spend plan require founder/accountant/finance review.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Approve a 12-month operating plan and first 90-day budget before commitments.

launch_controls.control: Source rights, refresh cadence, lineage, and API credentials must be approved before external source claims.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Add a no-write refresh proof and source-rights approval.

launch_controls.control: Deployment environment, access, logging, backup, incident response, support, and rollback require operator/security approval.
launch_controls.next_valid_move: Approve private beta deployment controls before external users.

next_valid_move: Board can review the generated packet for a controlled private beta while qualified Canadian customs, legal/privacy, finance, data, security, and operator approvals remain explicit gates.
proof_boundary: This is board-to-go-live candidate evidence for Canada-focused private beta review. It is not public launch approval, legal advice, financial advice, customs/tariff advice, CFIA approval, buyer validation, revenue proof, or production deployment approval. Human experts and the board review what the AI-built system produced and approve, reject, or redirect the next stage.

findings: The local product loop is usable for internal source readiness review.
The strongest go-live scope is private controlled beta, not public launch.
Operator copy must keep blocked claims visible rather than hide them.
simulated_expert_reviews.human_approval_gate: operator launch owner must approve the private beta scope and support workflow
simulated_expert_reviews.next_valid_move: Board reviews the generated brief and either approves a private beta or sends corrections.
simulated_expert_reviews.review_scope: Operator workflow, source-card readiness, dashboard, continuation lanes, and board packet.

findings: Canadian official tools are identified and linked.
The product does not make customs, tariff, CFIA, permit, or sanctions clearance claims.
The country matrix remains closed until qualified review is attached.
simulated_expert_reviews.human_approval_gate: licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified trade compliance reviewer must verify CBSA/CARM, tariff, CFIA, import controls, sanctions, and claim language
simulated_expert_reviews.next_valid_move: Send the country matrix and source packet to a licensed Canadian customs broker or qualified compliance reviewer.
simulated_expert_reviews.review_scope: Canadian import workflow, CARM, tariff classification, CFIA AIRS, import controls, and sanctions screening.

findings: The investor ask is a planning assumption, not an offer or financial advice.
A Canadian financial plan structure is available through BDC references.
Revenue, PMF, and willingness-to-pay remain diligence gates.
simulated_expert_reviews.human_approval_gate: founder, accountant, or finance advisor must approve financial projections, funding ask, runway, and pricing assumptions
simulated_expert_reviews.next_valid_move: Founder and finance reviewer should approve a 12-month budget, pricing experiment, and cash runway before spend commitments.
simulated_expert_reviews.review_scope: Draft financing ask, first 90-day operating assumptions, Canadian planning references, and revenue-claim boundaries.

findings: The product avoids legal, securities, customs, tariff, supplier, and public launch claims.
PIPEDA/privacy requirements are recognized as Canadian launch gates.
Terms, privacy notice, and liability boundary are not yet human-approved.
simulated_expert_reviews.human_approval_gate: Canadian counsel or privacy reviewer must approve legal copy, PIPEDA/privacy posture, entity/IP/terms, and public claims
implemented_inputs: PIPEDA source in Canada tool registry
simulated_expert_reviews.next_valid_move: Have Canadian counsel/privacy reviewer approve terms, privacy copy, liability boundaries, and investor language.
simulated_expert_reviews.review_scope: Legal claims, fundraising boundaries, PIPEDA/private-sector privacy posture, terms, and liability boundaries.

findings: Canadian official sources are attached as reference records.
Fixture data is still correctly bounded and not treated as live source proof.
Repeatable refresh, rights, and API credentials remain go-live gates.
simulated_expert_reviews.human_approval_gate: data owner must approve source rights, refresh cadence, lineage, and any credentialed/paid source usage
simulated_expert_reviews.next_valid_move: Implement a dated no-write refresh proof and attach source-rights approval before external source claims.
simulated_expert_reviews.review_scope: Official-source registry, Canadian data sources, repeatable refresh needs, rights, and fixture boundaries.

findings: External sends, paid actions, and live effects are still closed.
Canadian cyber baseline source is attached for the security checklist.
No production deployment is approved until operator/security signoff exists.
simulated_expert_reviews.human_approval_gate: operator/security owner must approve deployment environment, access control, incident response, backups, and support coverage
simulated_expert_reviews.next_valid_move: Approve a controlled private beta environment with access control, logging, incident response, and rollback owner.
simulated_expert_reviews.review_scope: External effects, deployment, access control, auditability, Canadian cyber baseline, support, and rollback.
